subcodes.first_line: O thou whose heart is turned to the Kingdom of God! I was informed of the contents of thy letter to the maidservant of God, Lua… Of those who arise in the service of this edifice there shall be no soul but shall be imbued by God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المقبله الی ملکوت الله انی اطلعت بمضمون خطابک الی امة الله لوا
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @predictions and prophecies
